nodes.title: 加载器仅可单选，选你有的模型

widgets_values: Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

nodes.title: 正向提示词
widgets_values: change the picture 1 to realistic photograph,
a RAW ultra-realistic photo,UHD,4K、8K、HDR、 High definition, ultra high definition, high detail, high texture, masterpiece, commercial photography

nodes.title: 模型下载
widgets_values:
此版本为SimpAI专属模型下载路径。

若第一次使用提示缺失模型时，请开启开关。 关闭开关跳过整组可以完全关闭模型下载功能

也可以手动点击选择下载

模型下载节点:https://github.com/Windecay/ComfyUI-Model-Downloader-plus
